title: Dos and Don'ts block: editor NodeView and toolbar insertion
description: Build the Tiptap Node + React NodeView for the `dos-donts` block (schema landed in TASK-71) and wire its insertion into the editor toolbar. Follows the established pattern (extension + NodeView in the same file, attrs mirrored to `data-*`, in-place variant switcher) set by `Callout` (TASK-28) and `ComponentEmbed` (TASK-29). Cover UI is explicitly deferred to TASK-73 — this task ships the block with title + description editable and no cover yet.
acceptanceCriteria: A toolbar control inserts a `dosDonts` node with a default variant (`do`), mirroring the pattern of `insertCallout` in `EditorToolbar.tsx`

The NodeView shows an in-place `do`/`dont` switcher (mirrors `Callout`'s switcher via `updateAttributes`, preserving the title/description content when switched) with distinct visual treatment per variant (color/icon), consistent with `CALLOUT_META`'s border/bg/icon pattern

Title is an editable field bound to the `titulo` attr (metadata, not rich content); description is the node's editable `block+` content area, using the same marks/nodes already registered in `editorExtensions`
Autosave persists the block through the existing pipeline (`blocks.saveDraft` → `serialize.ts` from TASK-71) with no changes needed to the autosave plumbing itself

New node is registered in `apps/admin/src/features/editor/extensions.ts` and works both in the editable `ContentEditor` and the read-only preview contexts (basic read-only rendering, without cover — full read-only polish is TASK-74)

steps.details: Create `apps/admin/src/features/editor/nodes/DosDonts.tsx`: `Node.create` named `dosDonts`, `content: 'block+'`, attrs `variant` (default `'do'`), `titulo` (default `''`), `cover` (default `null`); `parseHTML`/`renderHTML` mirroring attrs to `data-*`, same convention as `Callout.tsx`.

`ReactNodeViewRenderer` component: variant switcher (2 buttons, mirrors `CALLOUT_VARIANTS` switcher pattern with `updateAttributes`), a plain controlled text input for `titulo` (not part of ProseMirror content — a NodeView-local input calling `updateAttributes({ titulo })`), and `NodeViewContent` for the editable description body.

Add `DosDonts` to `editorExtensions` in `apps/admin/src/features/editor/extensions.ts`. Add an insert control to `EditorToolbar.tsx` (mirrors `insertCallout`'s pattern, including the caret-positioning workaround documented there for inserting into a non-empty paragraph).

Insert a `do` block, type a title and description, switch to `dont` and confirm content is preserved, confirm autosave reaches `saved` status, reload and confirm the content round-trips through `getByTab`.

technicalNotes: Reuse the caret-positioning fix documented in `EditorToolbar.tsx`'s `insertCallout` (NodeView mounts async; the DOM caret needs a manual `view.domAtPos` retry via rAF) — the same gotcha applies here.
Cover UI is out of scope for this task by design (TASK-73) — ship with `cover: null` always for now; the attr exists in the schema (TASK-71) so TASK-73 doesn't need another type change.
